title: Juma juice
content:
{{Top}} {{Food |image= |name=Juma juice |origin= |date= |race= |creator= |found=*[[Sran]]''[[The High Republic: Tempest Runner]]'' *[[Toshara]]''[[Star Wars Outlaws]]'' |type=Beverage |description= |animals= |plants= |other= |edible= |inedible= |potable=[[Er'Kit (species)|Er'Kit]] |nutrition= |effects= |dishes= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Juma juice?''"
"''No.|Andrik Keller and a serving droid|}} '''Juma juice''' was a [[Foodstuff|beverage]] [[Diet|potable]] to the [[Er'Kit (species)|Er'Kit]] [[species]]. In [[231 BBY]],''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]'' dates the events of ''[[The High Republic: Tempest Runner]]'' to [[231 BBY]]. former [[Nihil]] [[Strike]] [[Andrik Keller]] visited a [[Unidentified cantina (Sran)|cantina]] on the [[Ash Worlds]] [[planet]][[The High Republic: Tempest Runner (script)|''The High Republic: Tempest Runner'' script]] [[Sran]]. Attempting to order a drink, Keller asked the [[Unidentified serving droid|serving droid]] if he had juma juice, but was told no, leading Keller to eventually settle on ordering a glass of [[vematoid]]. {{Gamemechanics|Star Wars Outlaws|canon=1}} In [[3 ABY]],{{OutlawsDate}} a shipment of stock which included juma juice was confiscated by an [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[Customs official|customs officer]] on [[Renpalli Station]] in orbit over the [[Outer Rim Territories|Outer Rim]] [[moon]] [[Toshara]] before it could reach its rightful recipient, a [[Mon Calamari]] [[merchant]] named [[Jonkah Rremset]] on the surface of Toshara. The shipment ultimately got to Rremset after he enlisted the help of the [[Scoundrel/Legends|scoundrel]] [[Kay Vess]].''[[Star Wars Outlaws]]'' {{Endgame}} ==Behind the scenes== Juma juice was first mentioned in the [[canon]] continuity in the [[2021]] audio drama ''[[The High Republic: Tempest Runner]]'' by [[Cavan Scott]]. The juice was originally introduced in the [[Star Wars Legends|legends]] continuity in the [[2002]] junior novel ''[[Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi]]'' by [[Jude Watson]].''[[Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi]]'' ==Appearances== *''[[The High Republic: Tempest Runner]]'' {{1stm}} *[[The High Republic: Tempest Runner (script)|''The High Republic: Tempest Runner'' script]] {{Mo}} *''[[Star Wars Outlaws]] {{Mo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Juices]]
